description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and matching tights. Product Details White printed shirt made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, full buttoned placket, is sleeveless and has a curved hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height
